violations.issue: Form labels not programmatically associated with controls
violations.evidence: Playwright getByLabel found 0 matches for Email and Password on login form
Runtime scan found unnamed icon buttons on key pages; password toggle missing aria-label

violations.issue: Clickable table rows are mouse-centric and not keyboard semantic controls
violations.evidence: DataTable row click implemented on <tr> with cursor-pointer but no keyboard handlers/role
DataTable headers render visual sort icons only
Modal sets initial focus but does not enforce robust focus trap cycle

violations.issue: Reflow failure on 320px for data-heavy pages

remediation_plan: Adopt accessibility linting and axe checks in CI for core routes
Refactor FormField to mandatory id/htmlFor pairing and aria-describedby for errors
Introduce accessible icon button primitive requiring aria-label
Upgrade DataTable semantics and keyboard interaction model
Harden responsive layout tokens for 320/375 touch scenarios
